name: cde-compliance
title: Sensitive Data & Compliance Radar
description: CDE-authored — restricted-to-ungoverned flows by source, asset sensitivity mix & GB moved into each destination sensitivity tier over PDC-BIDB-EXT.

dataAccesses.name: RestrictedBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT split_part(orig_namespace,'://',1) AS src, SUM(restricted_to_ungoverned_count) AS flows FROM fact_lineage_connection GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(restricted_to_ungoverned_count) > 0 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 15

dataAccesses.name: SensMix
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sens, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: BytesByDestSens
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(regexp_replace(dest_sensitivity,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),'Unknown') AS sens, ROUND(SUM(bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb FROM fact_lineage_connection WHERE dest_sensitivity IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
